cases.title: Scenario matrix row for student login gate before check-in submission
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Student check-in validation block applies (FR-15, FR-16, FR-17, FR-18, BR-05 to BR-07).
An Open class session exists with a valid QR token and enrolled student fixture available.
steps: Open the student check-in entry path without establishing an authenticated session.
Attempt to proceed to check-in submission.
After successful student login, retry submission with the same check-in context.
cases.expected: Unauthenticated access is blocked with login redirect or Unauthenticated rejection; after successful authentication the student can proceed to submit check-in.

cases.title: Check-in command short-circuits at auth boundary without attendance write
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for identity and check-in modules.
Open session with valid QR token exists; no authenticated student actor is bound to the request context.
steps: Invoke the check-in service command path with a valid qrToken but no resolved student actor.
Query CheckInAttempt and AttendanceRecord tables for the target session and student placeholder context.
Repeat with authenticated enrolled student actor as control.
cases.expected: Unauthenticated invocation records terminal outcome Unauthenticated (or rejects before success write) and creates no Present/Late AttendanceRecord; authenticated control can proceed past the auth gate.

cases.title: HTTP contract for unauthenticated POST /v1/check-ins rejection
preconditions: Open class session with valid qrToken exists in test environment.
Request is sent without Authorization header.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins with body containing qrToken and clientTimestamp.
Omit Authorization header entirely.
Inspect HTTP status, response envelope data/meta/error fields.
cases.expected: API returns 401 with standard envelope where data is null and error.code is Unauthenticated; no successful attendance outcome is returned.

cases.title: Primary workflow login gate then successful student check-in
preconditions: Open session with rotating valid QR token and enrolled student account exist.
Student begins flow without an active auth session.
steps: Student obtains check-in URL or token from QR scan while unauthenticated.
Student completes POST /v1/auth/login and receives accessToken with Student role.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with Authorization Bearer token and valid qrToken within present window.
cases.expected: Login gate is satisfied first; subsequent check-in returns 200 with data.outcome Success and attendance status Present or Late per policy.

cases.title: RBAC denial when non-student roles attempt QR check-in submission
preconditions: Open session with valid qrToken exists.
Lecturer and ITAdmin users are authenticated with valid bearer tokens.
steps: Lecturer calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and Authorization header.
ITAdmin calls POST /v1/check-ins with the same token context.
Enrolled Student calls the same endpoint as authorized control.
cases.expected: Lecturer and ITAdmin receive authorization denial (403 Forbidden) per permission matrix; enrolled Student passes auth gate and proceeds to business validation.

cases.title: Boundary error for invalid or expired bearer token on check-in
preconditions: Open session with valid qrToken exists.
Test client holds an expired or malformed JWT bearer token.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins with Authorization Bearer set to expired token.
Call POST /v1/check-ins with Authorization Bearer set to malformed token.
Inspect HTTP status and error.code for both requests.
cases.expected: Both requests fail authentication with 401 and error.code Unauthenticated in the standard envelope; no attendance success row is created.

cases.title: UI journey redirects unauthenticated student to login and returns to check-in
preconditions: Student check-in deep link or QR-resolved URL is available for an Open session.
Browser profile has no active Attendly session cookie.
steps: Navigate directly to the student check-in URL without logging in.
Verify redirect to login page (PG-01) with return URL preserved where supported.
Submit valid student credentials on login form.
Confirm browser returns to check-in page with prior token context retained.
Complete check-in submission from the restored check-in UI.
cases.expected: Unauthenticated visit cannot submit check-in; login form accepts credentials; post-login navigation returns student to check-in flow and enables submission.

cases.title: Check-in attempt terminates at Unauthenticated without attendance mutation
preconditions: Open class session with valid qrToken exists in integration test database.
Request context has no resolved Student actor (missing or invalid Authorization).
steps: Capture beforeState: no Present/Late AttendanceRecord for the target session and no authenticated student actor bound.
Submit check-in command with valid qrToken through the module integration boundary without Authorization.
Capture afterState for session roster rows and any persisted attempt records.
cases.expected: SM-04 evaluation short-circuits at Unauthenticated as the first guard per validation order; afterState shows no Present/Late AttendanceRecord mutation and the API layer returns 401 with error.code Unauthenticated.
